dataList.content: Look one на one
The pages remind me you'll always be villain

Now they're gone

From the hell that served as my one и only home
Though it may hurt today
Tomorrow, I'll be heading my way

What did we expect?
My dearest friend
Tell me когда we shall make it end

Like one of those mad men
Tip tappity tappity tap
Dance our last dance, sing
Spinning vinyl opera (lascia ch'io pianga)
Longing for this moment (mia cruda sorte)
Brewing все this hatred (e che sospiri)

Don't you worry
I saved a spot for you in the recycle bin

Stop now one на one

For you, the shelves have fallen
Now they're gone
See? Now they're gone, forever gone
From the стадии that allowed us our one и only dreams
What's more to say?
Pain always catches до those who chooses to stay
